metadata.title: Extract Agent Workspace
metadata.description: Document setup workspace for classification and extraction configuration.

common.apiError: Something went wrong while talking to the API.

shell.title: Extract Agent
shell.description: Operator workspace for extraction setup and classification routing.
shell.starterSetupDescription: Seeded extraction templates and document categories are loaded automatically after the API starts.

workspace.title: Welcome to the workspace
workspace.content: Extract Agent is organized around a simple setup flow: define extraction templates, map document categories, then upload source files.

templatesNav.title: Start with extraction templates
templatesNav.content: This area is where you define the typed schema the backend should extract from each classified document.

templatesTable.title: Review or create schemas
templatesTable.content: Use the seeded templates as a starting point, open a schema to inspect it, or create a new extraction template for a new document shape.

categoriesNav.title: Map your routing labels
categoriesNav.content: Document categories connect classifier output labels to the correct extraction template.

categoriesTable.title: Manage document categories
categoriesTable.content: Review the current routing targets here, then open a category to refine it or create a new category when your classifier needs a new destination.

documentsNav.title: Upload source files
documentsNav.content: Once setup is ready, switch to Documents to ingest PDFs, images, Word files, and spreadsheet exports.

documentsUpload.title: This is the intake panel
documentsUpload.content: For this walkthrough, the tour preloads the sample PDF “convention mandat MSH.pdf” so you can see the real document-processing flow from intake to review.

documentsUploadAction.title: Upload the sample document
documentsUploadAction.content: When you continue, the tour clicks this button and uploads the sample file to the API. Once the upload succeeds, the app opens the document detail page automatically.

processDocument.title: Open the processing flow
processDocument.content: This button launches the document workflow. It is where operators choose the extraction template, decide between manual or AI classification, and review the extraction draft before confirmation.

templateSelection.title: Pick the extraction template
templateSelection.content: For this sample, we use “Convention de mandat de maîtrise d'ouvrage”. The selected template defines the fields the extraction agent must retrieve and review.

aiClassification.title: Manual or AI classification
aiClassification.content: Operators can classify the document manually or use AI. In this visit we use AI. If the classifier cannot match the document to an existing category, it pauses here and asks for confirmation. For this sample, the category is already known, so the workflow continues automatically.

liveProcessing.title: Follow the run live
liveProcessing.content: This timeline streams the agent progress in real time. You can watch classification first, then the extraction phase, and inspect the event trail while the workflow is running.

categorySuggestion.title: Accept a suggested category when needed
categorySuggestion.content: If AI cannot match the document to an existing category, it pauses here and proposes a new one. In that case, the tour now explains this branch and automatically accepts the suggestion so extraction can continue. If no suggestion appears, the tour skips this step and goes straight to the extraction draft.

extractionWait.title: Extraction is running, wait for completion
extractionWait.content: After classification, the agent starts the structured extraction run. During this phase the tour stays locked on this progress panel, does not allow manual advance, and moves on automatically as soon as the run is marked complete and the extraction draft is ready.

initialExtraction.title: Review the first extraction draft
initialExtraction.content: The first draft is ready here. In this example, the SIRET ends with 17 and the maître d’ouvrage address still needs correction, so we are going to fix both through the chat.

initialAddress.title: Review the extracted address
initialAddress.content: This step also highlights the “Adresse du mandataire” field. That is the value that needs to be replaced with 11 Rue Jaufre Rudel 34080 Montpellier before the extraction is confirmed.

correctionPrompt.title: Send a targeted correction
correctionPrompt.content: The correction chat lets you request very precise changes. For this tour, the prompt is filled with the exact instruction: “The address is 11 Rue Jaufre Rudel 34080 Montpellier and the siret number ends with a 3”.

sendCorrection.title: Ask the agent to update the draft
sendCorrection.content: When you continue, the tour sends that message. The agent then searches the document again, records its activity, and updates only the affected fields.

correctionActivity.title: Watch the correction activity
correctionActivity.content: Each correction request keeps its own live activity trace here. While the agent is working, the tour stays locked on this area and prevents manual interaction, then continues automatically once the correction is complete.

correctedValues.title: The corrected values are back
correctedValues.content: The draft has now been updated. The SIRET ends with 3 and the maître d’ouvrage address is set to 11 Rue Jaufre Rudel 34080 Montpellier.

correctedAddress.title: The corrected address is now applied
correctedAddress.content: The “Adresse du mandataire” field now shows 11 Rue Jaufre Rudel 34080 Montpellier. The tour therefore shows the corrected SIRET and the corrected address separately before the final confirmation.

confirmReview.title: Confirm the reviewed extraction
confirmReview.content: Once the draft looks correct, validate it here. Confirmation closes the review workspace and promotes the reviewed extraction to the main document page.

finalOverview.title: Confirmed result on the document page
finalOverview.content: The document detail page now shows the confirmed extraction and keeps the correction chat available for later follow-up if an operator wants to request more changes.

documentsTable.title: Track everything you ingest
documentsTable.content: Uploaded files appear in this registry so you can preview them, inspect their metadata, and open the full document detail view.

language.title: Switch the interface language
language.content: The workspace can be used in English or French, and the UI updates immediately when you switch.

replay.title: Need the walkthrough again?
replay.content: Use this button anytime to replay the onboarding tour for yourself or for another operator.

validation.moduleKeyLabelRequired: Each module needs both a key and a label.
validation.fieldKeyLabelRequired: Each field needs both a key and a label.
validation.columnKeyLabelRequired: Each table column needs both a key and a label.

templatesDashboard.title: Extraction templates
templatesDashboard.description: Keep the catalog visible as a table, then open one template at a time to review fields, update modules, or remove the schema.

templatesTable.title: Extraction templates
templatesTable.description: Manage the schemas that define which fields should be captured once a document has been classified.
templatesTable.empty: No extraction templates yet. Start from the seeded examples or create one from scratch.

templateEditorScreen.description: Open one extraction template at a time, review its modules and fields, then save changes without juggling a second panel beside the table.

status.reset: Changes reset to the last saved version.

templateDetailPanel.description: Define the structured fields that should be extracted after a document has been classified into the right category.

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Group fields by business area like vendor info, payment details, or line items.
modules.empty: No modules yet. Add one to start defining fields.

module.title: Module
module.label: Module label
module.empty: No fields in this module yet.

field.label: Label
field.emptyColumns: Add at least one column for this table field.

documentCategoriesSection.title: Document categories
documentCategoriesSection.description: Manage the classifier output labels in a single list, then open each category on its own page to rename it, save changes, or delete it.

documentsSection.title: Documents
documentsSection.description: Bring original files into the workspace, keep the intake list visible, and open one document at a time when you need to inspect metadata or remove it from storage.

documentUploadPanel.title: Upload documents
documentUploadPanel.description: The uploader accepts the current supported intake formats and sends files to the API one by one so a single browser tab does not flood the backend.

dropzone.title: Choose one or more documents
dropzone.description: PDFs, common document images, Word files, and spreadsheet exports are accepted.

docx.title: Document text preview
docx.empty: No previewable text was extracted from this Word document.

spreadsheet.title: Spreadsheet preview
spreadsheet.empty: No preview data is available for this spreadsheet.
spreadsheet.truncated: The preview is intentionally limited to the first sheets, rows, and columns so large workbooks stay responsive.

documentsTable.title: Uploaded documents
documentsTable.description: Review the stored source files before classification and extraction. Open any row to inspect its metadata or remove it.
documentsTable.empty: No uploaded documents yet. Add one or more files to start building the ingestion catalog.

documentDetailScreen.description: Review the original file, its extracted data, and the correction chat from one place once the document has been processed.
documentDetailScreen.summaryDescription: This record represents the original file currently stored in Cloudflare R2 plus the metadata persisted in PostgreSQL.
documentDetailScreen.privateStorageNotice: This document is stored successfully, but no public URL is exposed because the bucket is private or `R2_PUBLIC_URL` is not configured as a public asset domain.
documentDetailScreen.previewDescription: Keep the source document visible while you inspect the extracted data and discuss corrections.
documentDetailScreen.metadataDescription: Core metadata for the stored source file and the current classification state.
documentDetailScreen.extractionDescription: Review the current extraction result in a compact format, then use the chat to request targeted changes.
documentDetailScreen.extractionPendingDescription: The extracted result and correction chat will appear here after you confirm the review.
documentDetailScreen.extractionEmpty: No extraction has been produced for this document yet.
documentDetailScreen.extractionPendingHint: The extraction draft is ready but still waiting for your confirmation. Finish the review flow before the final result is displayed on this page.
documentDetailScreen.extractionProcessingHint: Extraction is still running. Open the processing flow to follow the live progress and review the draft when it is ready.
documentDetailScreen.extractionFailedHint: The extraction run failed. Open the processing flow to retry it or inspect the latest run state.
documentDetailScreen.processedHint: This document is already confirmed. Use the correction chat below if you want to request changes.

documentProcessing.title: Process document
documentProcessing.missingThread: The AI review thread is missing. Start the AI flow again.
documentProcessing.templateDescription: The selected template defines which fields the extraction agent must collect and review.
documentProcessing.templateRequired: Choose an extraction template before starting the workflow.

options.manualDescription: Choose an existing category yourself and save the document immediately.
options.aiDescription: Sample stored chunks, compare them with the category catalog, and pause for review only if a new category is needed.

ai.title: AI classification
ai.streamingEmpty: The agent is starting. Live progress updates will appear here.
ai.timelineEmpty: Start the AI run to see the full event stream.

eventDescriptions.metadata: Connected to the classification run and waiting for streamed updates.
eventDescriptions.custom: The agent emitted a progress update.
eventDescriptions.values: The run published a state snapshot.
eventDescriptions.updatesFallback: The run published a state update.
eventDescriptions.interrupt: The agent paused and is waiting for a human decision on the suggested category.

extraction.streamingEmpty: The extraction agent is starting. Live progress updates will appear here.
extraction.timelineEmpty: Start extraction to see the retrieval and extraction steps.
extraction.noSource: No source chunks were linked to this value.
extraction.tableEmpty: No evidence-backed rows were extracted for this table.
extraction.reviewHint: You can edit extracted values before confirming the result.
extraction.emptyState: No extraction draft is available yet.

correction.title: Correction chat
correction.description: Discuss the draft with the agent, ask for targeted fixes, or send a direct correction before you confirm the extraction.
correction.emptyChat: No correction messages yet. Ask the agent to fix or re-check a value.
correction.conversationDescription: Use the chat to correct values directly or ask the agent to search deeper in the document.
correction.activityEmpty: The correction agent will show its search and update steps here.
correction.inputPlaceholder: Example: The enterprise address is incorrect. Search again and update it, or: The correct address is 12 Rue des Fleurs, Bordeaux.
correction.hint: The agent can apply direct corrections from your message or search the document again with its retrieval tools.
correction.shortcutHint: Press Ctrl+Enter or Cmd+Enter to send.
correction.suggestionDirectPrompt: The extracted value is incorrect. I will provide the corrected value directly. Please update only that field and keep the rest of the draft unchanged.
correction.suggestionSearchPrompt: This extracted value looks wrong. Search the document again, compare the evidence, and update only the incorrect field.
correction.suggestionSpreadsheetPrompt: Please re-check the calculation or spreadsheet-derived result. Use the spreadsheet inspection tools if needed and update only the affected values.

documentCategoriesTable.title: Document categories
documentCategoriesTable.description: Define the normalized document types your classifier can assign before routing and extraction.
documentCategoriesTable.empty: No categories yet. Add a few normalized document types so uploads can be classified before extraction.
documentCategoriesTable.normalizedRoutingTarget: Used as a normalized routing target.

documentCategoryValidation.labelKeyPattern: Label key must use lowercase snake_case.

documentCategoryEditorScreen.description: Review one classification target at a time, then save or delete it from a dedicated detail view instead of splitting the screen.

status.reset: Changes reset to the last saved version.

documentCategoryDetailPanel.description: Keep categories broad enough to be reusable, but specific enough to drive classification and routing decisions. The label key is the stable frontend translation handle.

preview.title: Localized preview
preview.description: The frontend uses the translated label for this key when one exists. The classifier can still use the English name.
